title: Application
description: A BSA application / case — the core unit of the Board of Standards & Appeals. Canonical schema reconciling the 'BSA Applications Status' dataset (yvxd-uipr, 34 columns) and the Decisions Map (99rv-74dm). Keyed on the calendar number. Covers variances (BZ), extensions of time / vested rights (BZY), Special Order Calendar amendments (SOC), and appeals of DOB determinations (Appeal), filed 1998 to present.

calendar.description: BSA calendar number ('calendar') — primary key, e.g. '2024-26-BZ'.

section.description: Zoning Resolution / General City Law section invoked ('section'), e.g. '72-21', 'GCL 36'.
